# Security Policy

We only treat vulnerabilities in production dependencies as blocking.

Dev tooling vulnerabilities (release scripts, CLI tools, build utilities) are reviewed but do not block development unless exploitable in CI or runtime.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Email: [security@Yorno.me](mailto:security@Yorno.me)

Include: description of the issue, steps to reproduce, potential impact. You will receive a response within 72 hours. Please allow time to patch before public disclosure.
